author: ericcano
body:
#### PR description:

The CUDA driver version lookup via NVML fails when using gaming GPUs. This PR makes the driver name fallback to "unknown" instead of failing CMSSW entirely.

#### PR validation:

A reduced version of the HLT (GPU part only) runs fine and like on enterprise GPUs after this change. Did not run before.
title: Makes CUDA driver version lookup fallback if NVML is not availble (gaming GPUs)
